s: In 2017, Drew Steckenrider suited up for MIA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.340, WHIP 1.380, SO 54, WAR 0.600.
In 2018, Drew Steckenrider suited up for MIA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.900, WHIP 1.270, SO 74, WAR 0.500.
In 2019, Drew Steckenrider suited up for MIA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.280, WHIP 0.980, SO 14, WAR -0.600.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIA -> SEA).
In 2021, Drew Steckenrider suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.000, WHIP 1.020, SO 58, WAR 1.300. Notable context: Joined SEA.
In 2022, Drew Steckenrider suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.650, WHIP 1.810, SO 10, WAR 0.000.
